final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean UI/UX mockup, bright airy feminine aesthetic, web design in the style of Glossier or Mecca landing pages
Composition: wide hero banner layout with three-column structure (left text content, center model, right product display), desktop viewport framing
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing serum
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient background from white to pale pink, subtle floral accents with purple flowers scattered in corners, generous negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, clean and fresh mood, premium beauty product atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, gold for stat card highlights
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible at web resolution; UI elements must follow logical hierarchy; pill badges and stat cards must be clearly readable
Avoid: cluttered layout, illegible small text, dark or moody lighting, masculine or aggressive styling, generic stock photo aesthetic
